jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Cuemath - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Cuemath in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cuemath:
Cuemath is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
